task_completion.description: Navigate to the Edit Layer page for the ne_countries layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoServer web interface shows the 'Edit Layer' page for the layer named 'ne_countries' in the 'ne' workspace.

task_completion.description: Set the layer Title to 'World Political Boundaries (1:110m)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' text input field on the Data tab contains exactly 'World Political Boundaries (1:110m)'.

task_completion.description: Set the layer Abstract to the specified descriptive text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Abstract' text area contains 'Country boundaries from the Natural Earth 1:110 million scale cultural dataset. Includes sovereign states and dependent territories with administrative boundary polygons suitable for small-scale thematic mapping and reference cartography.'

task_completion.description: Add the required keywords to the layer metadata.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Keywords' list or input area contains 'countries', 'political', 'boundaries', 'natural-earth', and 'admin-0'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Declared SRS is set to EPSG:4326.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Declared SRS' field in the Coordinate Reference Systems section contains 'EPSG:4326'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the layer is marked as Queryable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Queryable' checkbox on the Data tab is checked.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page, and a success message or the updated Layers list is shown.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer Web Administration interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GeoServer web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal curl commands or the REST API.

integrity.description: The agent typed or pasted the metadata into the actual GeoServer form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is visible inside the standard GeoServer input fields (Title, Abstract, Keywords), not just in a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing GeoServer XML configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening terminal editors (like nano or vim) to modify featuretype.xml files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is Natural Earth's 110m Admin 0 Countries. The expected title 'World Political Boundaries (1:110m)' is descriptively accurate for this dataset. The keywords (countries, political, boundaries, natural-earth, admin-0) are appropriate and verified. The SRS EPSG:4326 (WGS 84) is the standard coordinate system for this data. The abstract accurately reflects the inclusion of both sovereign states and dependent territories. The Queryable setting is a standard WMS best practice.
